authorization_status.required_sentence: YES: 授權擴充 determine_capture_windows() 讀取 WBC/NPB game_times
authorization_status.action_taken: readiness-only analysis, no scheduler code modified

new_function_behavior: Filter to games within next lookahead_hours
Return list of UTC datetime objects
Return [] on any OSError or parse failure
implementation_design.backward_compatibility: MLB timeline logic unchanged — new WBC logic is additive only
implementation_design.fallback_behavior: If tsl_odds_history.jsonl missing: wbc_game_times=[], MLB logic runs normally

trigger_window_rules.note: Closing window is wider than pregame (-120 to +5) to catch game_time ±2h matches

source_discriminator: All non-MLB games present in tsl_odds_history.jsonl but not in odds_timeline.jsonl
test_cases_designed: WBC game at T-90min triggers decision window
WBC game at T-30min triggers pregame window
WBC game at T-5min triggers closing window
WBC game at T+30min still triggers closing window (within -120min)
WBC game at T+3h does NOT trigger (>-120min)
Missing tsl_odds_history.jsonl → no crash, no WBC windows
NPB game uses identical logic to WBC
MLB window unaffected when WBC game is in window
Audit entry exists for each WBC trigger
risks: If tsl_odds_history.jsonl grows very large, loading on every 15-min daemon tick adds I/O. Mitigation: only read last N records or use a separate manifest file.
Game timezone parsing: game_time may be in Asia/Taipei (+08:00). Must ensure UTC normalization.
Match dedup: same match_id appears multiple times. Must deduplicate before building game_times list.
Closing window expansion (-120min): may cause extra crawl ticks post-game. TSL API typically stops showing odds ~30min after game start, so this is low-risk.
